limitations: No quantified AI investment amounts, headcount, or program budgets disclosed; investment intensity scored on named but unquantified commitment.

Risk disclosure includes named risk categories and mechanisms (regulatory, cybersecurity, competitive disadvantage) but no quantification or named governance bodies, capping score at 4.
